description: Legal testimony. In Hebrew, with one signature in both Hebrew and Latin script. Location: Alexandria. Dating: 5624 AM in the month of Shevat which is 1864 CE. The witnesses attest that Yaʿaqov Menaḥem b. Yosef David has given a bill of divorce (get) to his wife Veneziana Yeta(?) bt. Avraham. She has received her ketubba payment in full. Witnesses: Seʿadya b. Aharon and Natan Ben-ʿAmram. The latter's full name was Natan b. Ḥayyim ʿAmram and he lived from 1791 CE or 1805 CE to 1870 CE (the exact paleography of his signature requires further research). R. Natan ʿAmram published widely and served both as an emissary to Livorno and communal rabbi in Alexandria. MCD.
description_he: עדות משפטית בעברית. חתימה אחת בעברית ולטינית. מקום: אלכסנדריה. תאריך: שבט ה'תרכ"ד = 1864 לספירה. העדים מאשרים שיעקב מנחם בן יוסף דוד נתן גט לאשתו ונציאנה ייטה(?) בת אברהם, שקיבלה תשלום כתובה מלא. עדים: סעדיה בן אהרן ונתן בן-עמרם.
